title: DaVinci Resolve Downloader config
description: Config file for davinci-resolve-downloader. Keys mirror the CLI flags; every key is optional and sits between env vars and built-in defaults in the resolution chain (CLI > env > config > default).

$schema.description: URL of this JSON Schema, for editor validation and autocompletion.

country.description: Country code or full name, e.g. "US" or "United States".

email.$comment: BMD bmdEmailValidator regex; keep in sync with ValidationService.EMAIL_PATTERN.
email.description: Email address. Use a real one to register as yourself; the default is an obvious placeholder.

phone.$comment: BMD bmdPhoneValidator regex; keep in sync with ValidationService.PHONE_PATTERN.
phone.description: Phone number. Digits, spaces, parentheses, plus and minus only.

timeout.description: Download timeout in milliseconds. Default 900000 (15 min).

zipcode.description: Postal/zip code. Letters, digits, spaces and dashes.
